examples: In these examples the sense is more of a profession than a hawker of goods.
A hawker walks with her goods crosses a street in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, on April 11.
I wish I were a hawker, spending my days on the road, crying, "bangles, crystal bangles!"
Singapore's hawker centres started partly for hygiene reasons, and to keep our water pollution in control.
Singapore's food courts, known locally as hawker centres, are popular with locals and tourists alike.
